example: We go on a trip to Da Nang every summer.
I booked a hotel room near the beach online.

vietnamese: trải nghiệm văn hóa địa phương
example: I always try to experience local culture when travelling.
I bought some souvenirs for my family and friends.

vietnamese: tổ chức / tham gia lễ hội
example: We celebrate Tet with the whole family every year.
That trip gave me a very memorable experience.
We enjoyed the breathtaking scenery of mountains and rivers.
I tried the local cuisine — it was fresh and delicious.
